Dana Cohen
dana.cohen.dev@gmail.com | 054-1234567 | Tel Aviv, Israel
github.com/danacohen | linkedin.com/in/danacohen

PROFILE
Backend developer with 4 years of experience building and scaling REST APIs and data
pipelines for consumer-facing products. Comfortable owning a service end to end, from
schema design through production monitoring.

EXPERIENCE

Backend Developer | Tomato Labs | Tel Aviv | Mar 2022 - Present
- Designed and built a REST API in Python/FastAPI serving 60K+ daily active users
- Migrated the legacy monolith's billing module to a standalone microservice, cutting
  average billing-related incident response time by 40%
- Introduced Redis caching for the product catalog endpoint, reducing p95 latency from
  480ms to 90ms
- Wrote integration tests with pytest, raising backend test coverage from 35% to 82%
- Mentored two junior engineers and ran the team's weekly code review sessions

Software Engineer | Northwind Systems | Herzliya | Jul 2019 - Feb 2022
- Built internal tooling in Django for the operations team to track shipment SLAs
- Implemented a nightly ETL job in Python and Airflow that consolidated data from five
  external partner APIs into a single PostgreSQL warehouse
- Optimized slow PostgreSQL queries on the orders table, cutting report generation time
  from 12 minutes to 90 seconds
- Participated in on-call rotation and authored the team's incident postmortem template

Freelance Web Developer | Self-employed | 2018 - 2019
- Delivered five small business websites using Django and vanilla JavaScript
- Set up CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions for two recurring freelance clients

EDUCATION
B.Sc. Computer Science | Tel Aviv University | 2015 - 2019
Graduated with honors, GPA 93/100
Relevant coursework: Algorithms, Databases, Distributed Systems

SKILLS
Python, FastAPI, Django, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, AWS, Airflow, pytest, Git, C++, Java

LANGUAGES
